organizationvolunteers.title: Galaksi Jurnalistik
organizationvolunteers.description: Part of the Galaksi Jurnalistik SMAN 1 Singosari, which aims to broadcast informative news. As a treasurer, my role involves managing the financial aspects of the organization and supporting the achievement of our mission's goals. Through this involvement, I have discovered a significant parallel between my organizational and analytical skills gained as a Data Engineer in understanding data to create substansial information.
